note: Not a resume. A directed graph. Each node compounded the next.

items.title: Researcher
bullets: Applied-physics R&D at a defense-sector research institute
Designed and built radiolocation (radar) systems
First-principles reasoning under uncertainty — signal vs noise

items.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Built and customized enterprise ERP on Microsoft Dynamics AX
Shipped production software for core business processes
Learned how complex products are actually delivered

items.title: Scrum Master & Product Owner
bullets: Greenfield iOS/Android apps for US/EU clients, fixed-price
SM and PO on separate projects — client-facing translation
Repeat business: the truest success signal in services

items.title: Scrum Master (SAFe)
bullets: First Scrum Master into a SAFe rollout across ~16 teams
Used PI Planning to surface dependencies before they became delays
Turned transformation fatigue into structured execution

items.title: Enterprise Delivery Leader & Value Stream Architect
bullets: Embedded across six delivery teams + enterprise architecture governance
Diagnosed an invisible architecture-review queue; made it visible with SLEs
~40% end-to-end lead-time cut, with no added headcount

items.title: Enterprise Flow Leader (Kanban)
bullets: One of two coaches for an entire branch — coaching run as a flow system
Moved work out of notebooks and spreadsheets into a visible, governable system
Shifted managers from anecdotal status to flow-based decisions

items.title: Delivery Transformation Leader
bullets: Redesigned the operating model for core engineering (wallets, trading infra)
From "everyone does everything" to clear roles and decision paths
Reliability as existential, not just speed

items.title: Delivery Leader & Transformation Consultant
bullets: Delivery across distributed teams for global clients
Owned "the spaces between teams" — surfaced dependencies early
One credible picture of delivery risk for client executives
